details: The “Assistance Scheme for Occupational Diseases” is implemented by the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board (GBOCWWB), Labour, Skill Development & Employment Department, Government of Gujarat. Under the scheme, financial assistance is given to registered construction workers for 15 types of occupational diseases and 23 types of serious injuries.
benefits: Free medical treatment and monthly assistance of ₹1500/- shall be provided to the registered construction worker under normal circumstances in case of less than 90% disability.
Free medical treatment and monthly assistance of ₹3000/- shall be provided to the registered construction worker in case of 90 to 100% disability.
The above assistance shall be provided up to a maximum limit of ₹3,00,000/-.
Financial assistance is provided to the registered construction workers for 15 types of occupational diseases and 23 types of serious injuries.

Labourers falling under the category of construction workers as determined by the State Government from time to time, who should be registered with the Board as construction workers, shall be treated free of cost in a hospital approved by the State Government.
eligibility: The construction workers registered with the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board will be eligible to get the benefit of this scheme.
The registered worker who has any type of disability due to an occupational disease or any serious injuries can avail of the benefits under this scheme.

offline: Application Process for ‘E-Nirman Card’ under the GBOCWWB:
Step 01:
The applicant may visit the e-Nirman Portal:
https://enirmanbocw.gujarat.gov.in/
Step 02:
On the home page, under the tab ‘Login to Portal’, click on ‘
Please Register Here
Step 03:
Enter all the mandatory information and then click on ‘Register’.
Step 04:
After successful registration, the applicants can login through their User ID and Password.
Step 05:
Now, update your profile by entering all the necessary details as required and click on ‘Update’.
Step 06:
Select the ‘Construction Works Form’ and fill out all the mandatory information in the form.
Step 07:
Upload all the relevant documents, agree with the terms & conditions, and submit the form.
Step 08:
Once the application has been submitted, an application Number is generated which can be kept for future reference.
Process to track Application Status:
On the home page, click on ‘View Citizen Application Status’.
Enter the Application Number and Date of Birth.
Now click on ‘View Status’.
Application Process for Scheme Benefit:
The applicant may visit the Sanman Portal:
https://sanman.gujarat.gov.in/
On the home page, under the tab ‘Citizen Login’, click on ‘
Enter your Aadhaar Card Number, select user type, and then enter E-Nirman Card Number.
Now, click on ‘Fetch’ & submit the details.
Now, select the scheme and read the instructions carefully for the selected scheme.
Fill out the application form and upload all the relevant documents.
Agree with the Rules & Regulations and submit the application form. A confirmation email with the application Number will be sent to the registered email ID.

documents_required: Documents required for ‘E-Nirman Card’ under the GBOCWWB:
Proof of age (Birth certificate/Driving Licence/PAN Card/Voter ID Card)
with a percentage of disability with the signature of the certifying surgeon

faqs.question: Who administers this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme is administered by the Labour, Skill Development & Employment Department, Government of Gujarat, through the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board.

faqs.question: What types of benefits are offered under this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme offers free medical treatment and monthly assistance to eligible registered construction workers based on the severity of their disability due to occupational diseases or serious injuries.

faqs.question: What is the financial assistance provided under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Registered construction workers with less than 90% disability receive ₹1500/- monthly assistance, while those with 90 to 100% disability receive ₹3000/- monthly assistance.

faqs.question: Is there a maximum limit to the financial assistance provided?
faqs.answer: Yes, the assistance is provided up to a maximum limit of ₹3,00,000/-.

faqs.question: How many types of occupational diseases and serious injuries are covered under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme covers 15 types of occupational diseases and 23 types of serious injuries.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for the benefits under the scheme?
faqs.answer: Construction workers registered with the Gujarat Building and Other Construction Worker’s Welfare Board are eligible to avail of the benefits.

faqs.question: Is the medical treatment provided under the scheme free of cost?
faqs.answer: Yes, eligible workers receive free medical treatment in government-approved hospitals.

faqs.question: How does a registered construction worker apply for benefits under the scheme?
faqs.answer: The applicant may visit and apply through the Sanman Portal: https://sanman.gujarat.gov.in/

faqs.question: Can an applicant also apply through offline mode?
faqs.answer: Yes, for availing of the benefits of the scheme, the applicant may visit the district office of District Office of Labour Welfare Board.
